posts.text: We're now using AI on Mediabistro to filter job listings and improve the relevance to media and creative professionals. Made a huge difference - you should see a big improvement in the types of jobs posted on the site. One thing AI is good at (heck, maybe the only thing it's good at) is data analysis at scale. So we're excited about building a better experience for people. More to come!
posts.hook: We're now using AI on Mediabistro to filter job listings and improve the relevance to media and creative professionals.
posts.name: Miles Jennings

posts.text: Recruiting firms are like "a large fruit-themed technology company in the Santa Clara Valley is seeking a..." Just say it, guys, it's ok, no one wants your req | Miles Jennings
posts.hook: Recruiting firms are like "a large fruit-themed technology company in the Santa Clara Valley is seeking a..." Just say it, guys, it's ok, no…
posts.name: Miles Jennings

posts.text: AI was scaring everyone for a little while, and there's still a lot of that. Everyone is worried. But then people also seemed to realize recently that there are only so many em dashes and negative parallelisms that we can all take. Businesses are looking to break through the noise, and average content will get average returns.
posts.hook: AI was scaring everyone for a little while, and there's still a lot of that.
posts.name: Miles Jennings
